description.en: Render engineering documents from JSON to self-contained HTML. Component Assembly Styled Templates.
description.zh-CN: 将工程文档从 JSON 渲染为自包含 HTML。Component Assembly Styled Templates。

body.en: Author engineering documents as structured JSON; render to one self-contained HTML file.
body.zh-CN: 以结构化 JSON 编写工程文档；渲染为一个自包含 HTML 文件。

body.en: Inline CSS, no CDN, no external scripts. Opens in any browser, attaches to email, archives, and publishes to GitHub Pages.
body.zh-CN: 内联 CSS，无 CDN，无外部脚本。可在任意浏览器打开，也适合邮件附件、归档和发布到 GitHub Pages。

body.en: A Claude Code skill, or a standalone Python renderer with zero third-party dependencies.
body.zh-CN: 可作为 Claude Code skill 使用，也可作为零第三方依赖的独立 Python 渲染器使用。

text.en: CAST Docs is a controlled replacement for Markdown-based engineering documents. The JSON is the source. The HTML is the artifact. The renderer enforces one visual system, one class vocabulary, and one validation contract across every output.
text.zh-CN: CAST Docs 是对 Markdown 工程文档的受控替代方案。JSON 是源文件，HTML 是产物。渲染器在所有输出中强制使用同一套视觉系统、类名词表和校验契约。

text.en: Each scenario picks a section order and a set of components that fit a common writing situation. Open any preview to see a rendered example; the matching JSON fixture lives next to it in the repository.
text.zh-CN: 每个场景都会选择适合常见写作情境的章节顺序和组件集合。打开任意预览即可查看渲染示例；对应的 JSON fixture 位于仓库中的相邻位置。

text.en: Tracking down a bug, regression, or anomaly.
Comparing options and recording why one was chosen.
text.zh-CN: 比较多个方案，并记录选择某个方案的原因。

text.en: Aligning multiple teams on scope and ownership.
text.zh-CN: 让多个团队在范围和归属上达成一致。

text.en: Summarizing a long document or set of documents.
text.zh-CN: 总结长文档或一组文档。

text.en: Curating principles or guidelines for reuse.
text.zh-CN: 整理可复用的原则或指南。

text.en: Inspect every common block, inline mark, table, diff view, and diagram in one page.
text.zh-CN: 在一个页面中查看所有常用 block、富文本标记、表格、diff 视图和图表。

body.en: Markdown cannot carry callouts, decision matrices, diff blocks, diagram viewers, and controlled tables without per-renderer extensions. Owning the HTML produces consistent output across every viewer.
body.zh-CN: 如果不依赖各渲染器扩展，Markdown 无法稳定承载 callout、决策矩阵、diff block、图表查看器和受控表格。由我们掌控 HTML，才能在所有查看器中得到一致输出。

body.en: Prose to HTML by a model is non-deterministic. Prose to JSON to HTML separates content from rendering, keeps the JSON validatable and diffable, and lets the renderer produce byte-stable output.
body.zh-CN: 模型直接从 prose 生成 HTML 是非确定性的。prose 到 JSON 再到 HTML 可以分离内容和渲染，让 JSON 可校验、可 diff，并让渲染器产出字节稳定的结果。

body.en: Inline CSS, no external assets. The HTML survives being opened in any browser, attached to email, copied to S3, or served from GitHub Pages.
body.zh-CN: 内联 CSS，无外部资源。HTML 可以在任意浏览器打开，作为邮件附件发送，复制到 S3，或通过 GitHub Pages 提供服务。

body.en: Adding a new component, theme, layout, or interaction is config plus an asset file, not a Python branch. Visual and structural rules live in config/. The Python in scripts/ only assembles.
body.zh-CN: 新增组件、主题、布局或交互时，改配置和资源文件即可，而不是增加 Python 分支。视觉和结构规则放在 config/ 中，scripts/ 里的 Python 只负责组装。

text.en: Requires Python 3.9 or newer. Standard library only. Clone the repository and render one of the bundled examples:
text.zh-CN: 需要 Python 3.9 或更新版本。仅使用标准库。克隆仓库并渲染一个内置示例：

blocks.code:
git clone https://github.com/CAST-docs/cast-docs.git
cd cast-docs
python3 scripts/render_html.py \
  --input examples/problem-investigation.json \
  --output out.html \
  --validate

title.en: Use as a Claude Code skill
title.zh-CN: 作为 Claude Code skill 使用

body.en: Clone into ~/.claude/skills/cast-docs and the skill activates when you ask Claude for an engineering spec, decision record, or self-contained HTML document. References in references/ are loaded on demand.
body.zh-CN: 克隆到 ~/.claude/skills/cast-docs 后，当你要求 Claude 生成工程规格、决策记录或自包含 HTML 文档时，该 skill 会自动启用。references/ 中的参考材料会按需加载。

text.zh-CN: 安装方式、校验流程和仓库结构。

text.en: The contract every input document must satisfy.
text.zh-CN: 所有输入文档都必须满足的契约。

text.en: Design laws, generation contract, module architecture, interactive features.
text.zh-CN: 设计法则、生成契约、模块架构和交互能力。

body.en: Single-doc rendering with the full block library. cast-default theme compiled from theme tokens. Diagram viewer interaction with zoom, pan, SVG and PNG download. JSON schema and HTML profile validation.
body.zh-CN: 已支持单文档渲染和完整 block 库。cast-default 主题由 theme token 编译生成。图表查看器支持缩放、拖拽、SVG 和 PNG 下载。已具备 JSON schema 与 HTML profile 校验。

body.en: Document-set layout with sidebar, topbar, and pagination. Index builder for GitHub-Pages-friendly multi-page sites. Typography and spacing tokens compiled into the base CSS. Renderer-generated example HTML to replace any remaining hand-authored samples.
body.zh-CN: 支持带侧边栏、顶部栏和分页的文档集布局。为 GitHub Pages 友好的多页面站点生成索引。将排版和间距 token 编译进基础 CSS。用渲染器生成的示例 HTML 替换剩余手写样例。
